description_text:
Freestyle Comfort 5

Warranty details: 1 year on machine and 6 months on battery & sieve beds 

Things we like about Caire Freestyle Comfort :


	Built with curve design that fits in the natural curve of the body- comfortable to wear 
	Uses ultra breath detection technology that catches even mild breaths
	FAA approved
	Lightweight


Things we don't like about Caire Freestyle Comfort :


	Filers require regular cleaning and maintenance
	Does not deliver oxygen at continuous flow


Freestyle Comfort 5 is a popular pulse flow portable oxygen concentrator manufactured in the USA. It supplies oxygen at 1-5 pulse settings with a 90-96% oxygen purity level.

Lightweight and Easy to Carry: Freestyle Comfort 5 portable oxygen concentrator weighs 2.3 kgs and is light enough to be carried in a side bag.

Battery Backup: Freestyle Comfort has a battery backup of 4 hours with a single battery and 8 hours with an external battery.

Recharge Time: It takes 4 hours for its battery to get fully recharged.

Sound: The machine produces sound at 43 decibels which is almost negligible.

Outlet Pressure: This device has an outlet pressure of 30 PSI, higher than any other oxygen concentrator. 

Operating Altitude: Freestyle Comfort 5 can be operated at an altitude of 10000 feet.

Alarms: Loss of power, system malfunction and low flow oxygen alarm.

Certifications and Approvals: Freestyle Comfort 5 is US FDA and FAA approved. The machine is also CE certified.
